title: Curator File Received Event
description: A file appeared in a curated directory (a folder-curator watch root, e.g. client_dropbox). Producer is the directory's inbound watcher/pull. The same file_path may re-fire on rescan; use ordering_key 'file:<sha256(file_path)>' so downstream dedup is stable. See bloodbank/docs/event-naming.md and the folder-curator skill.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file that appeared in the curated directory.

file_name.description: Basename of the file, for display.

curated_dir.description: Absolute path of the curated directory (watch root) the file landed in.

file_size_bytes.description: Size of the file on disk in bytes at detection time.

mime_type.description: Detected MIME type, if probeable at detect time.

file_hash_sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of contents; the folder-curator ledger dedup key.

detected_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the watcher first observed the file.
